response.overview: A young man is abducted by a stranger. He does not know why he has been taken, nor does he know the man’s identity or name. The man, who exists in the shadows, grows resentful of the young man, his counterpart who lives in the light. Out of a twisted form of affection, he attempts to possess, control, and exploit the young man—another version of himself. Seizing an opportunity, the young man escapes. Enraged, the man commits an irreversible act that destroys the very possibility of continuing to exist as his counterpart.
response.title: 泉の中の二つの顔
